Premium 10' Canopy Tent Frame | Canopy Tents | Banners.com # 10 Foot Canopy Tent Hardware Have the canopy, but need the hardware? Weâ€™ve got you covered! Get your custom canopy tent back in business with this easily-to-assemble 10â€™ x 10â€™ custom canopy tent hardware! These canopy tents are perfect for keeping out of the rain or harmful sun rays and providing a stylish and reliable shelter solution for any occasion. ![Premium 10' Aluminum Tent Frame (Silver)](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/1694af20-a747-46e3-b450-555c8a2aba4b.jpeg) Product: Premium 10' Aluminum Tent Frame (Silver) Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) [Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\)) * [Product Dimensions](#88ffca2e-9258-4d58-8a94-72f071471fdd) * [Materials](#1cdeece2-1dce-42df-af2d-d28b8ce43b78) * [Warranty](#52c51dc9-00a9-4d84-b8be-2d922ae976ce) * [Shipping Times](#611e0aee-d578-4c12-a863-78e4773c3cd4) ### Product Dimensions Product Size: 120" W x 137" H x 120" D Collapsible Dimensions: 9.12" W x 62.75" H x 9.12" D Product Weight: 36lbs ### Materials Hardware: ABS Nylon, Aluminum * Frame is constructed of 1.1 mm anodized aluminum. * Frame features ABS glass-filled nylon joints. * Hexagon-shaped legs are 1.75" in diameter. * Legs feature plastic levers for pinch-free height adjustment. * Easy-Glide Tent Feet allow the tent frame to slide on dirt and grass, preventing the legs from catching. ### Warranty Lifetime Hardware Warranty - Standard warranty is a parts and labor warranty which warrants product against defects in material and workmanship. It does not cover damage due to accidents, abuse, or normal wear and tear. Products found to be defective will be replaced or repaired at factory's discretion. ### Shipping Process Please allow 5-7 days for shipping. Due to the size and nature of this product, it will be shipped via UPS Ground Shipping. ## Frequently Asked Questions #### Can this frame be secured to the ground? Yes! This canopy tent can be secured to the ground in the case of windy weather or strong winds. If you are interested in differing hardware for securing this tent, consider taking a look at our [sandbag](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents/sandbags-for-canopy-tents) options, or using the included rope and stake kit included with your full canopy tent kit purchase. #### What type of metal is the frame for this product made from? This is made from ABS Nylon and steel. #### Where can I purchase a canopy cover? You can purchase a canopy cover [](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents/10-foot-fabric-canopy-tent-covers)from Banners.com by either heading over to our [Canopy Covers](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents/10-foot-fabric-canopy-tent-covers) [](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents/10-foot-fabric-canopy-tent-covers)page, or by purchasing our [full canopy tent kit](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents/10-foot-canopy-tent-kit) that has both the frame and the cover in one kit. #### Does this customized tent frame meet FR Rating Requirements? Yes, it does meet FR Requirements. â€śFRâ€ť refers to the fire rating standards that our products must meet in order to ensure that they are safe for our customers to use if ever in a situation that a fire may occur.
